metadata.title: Labbaik Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Labbaik Saving Asaan is an ideal deposit product for you if you are an individual saver and wish to save for your spouse, children, parents, etc. You can take benefit from this special Mudarabah based Deposit account (available in six months to twenty years plan) for Umrah & Hajj where you will also be entitled for profit on the deposited amount, thus providing Customers a bigger incentive to save for Umrah/Hajj through Meezan Labbaik Saving Asaan.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Meezan Labbaik Saving Asaan Open a Labbaik Saving Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print A Holy Journey with Comfort & Convenience Labbaik Saving Asaan is an ideal deposit product for you if you are an individual saver and wish to save for your spouse, children, parents, etc. You can take benefit from this special Mudarabah based Deposit account (available in six months to twenty years plan) for Umrah & Hajj where you will also be entitled for profit on the deposited amount, thus providing Customers a bigger incentive to save for Umrah/Hajj through Meezan Labbaik Saving Asaan. Labbaik Saving Asaan Account can be opened by Individuals. Key Features Minimium Investment Minimum deposit required to open an account is Rs. 1,000/- Duration Labbaik Saving Plan is available for six (06) months to twenty (20) years Additional Deposits Customers can deposit additional amounts in order to complete the deposit amount and make the desired journey sooner Recurring Deposits Customers will deposit monthly contribution as per the deposit schedule plan Customer Choice After completion of the desired deposit amount, customers will have a right to travel with Meezan Bank or redeem their funds to go with an alternate company Withdrawal Schedule No pre-mature withdrawal schedule will be applied One Account, Many People Available for individuals, where customers can open a single / joint account with family members 50% Redeem Customers may redeem 50% of the contribution as per defined procedure, one-time in the entire deposit tenure No Cheque Book or Card Labbaik Saving Account is a non-chequing account, where no cheque book or VISA Debit Card will be issued How the Labbaik Savings Account Works Download Fatwa in English Download Fatwa in Urdu On agreeing to become a Saving Asaan Account holder, you will enter into the relationship of Mudarabah with the Bank. Under this relationship, you will be the Investor (or Rab-ul- Maal) and the Bank will be the Manager (or Mudarib) of the funds deposited by you in the Deposit pool. These funds will be utilized by the Bank to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes of financing, including but not limited to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharakah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Labbaik Savings Aasaan Monthly 0.45 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Savings Aasaan Monthly 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates How to Apply for a Labbaik Savings Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
